result.summary: Found 1 major layout issue: game cards are truncated/cut off on the right side of the carousel sections, affecting visual presentation and potentially usability.

issues.description: Game cards in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are partially cut off on the right edge. The rightmost cards appear truncated, preventing users from seeing complete game tiles.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the carousel container width, padding, or overflow properties to ensure all game cards are fully visible. Consider using proper overflow handling (hidden or auto) and ensure the grid/carousel properly contains all items without truncation at the viewport edges.
